programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Young Family Seeks Cozy Beach Hideaway in Emerald Isle
programs.desc: A Virginia couple is excited to finally pursue their dreams of owning a beach home in Emerald Isle, North Carolina. With their sons growing up quickly, they hope to build unforgettable memories by renovating a property with both personality and potential.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: A Home for Family on Matagorda Bay in Texas
programs.desc: An engineer buys a home along the shores of Matagorda Bay in Texas, where he's vacationed with his family for years; he'll renovate the home for himself and his adult daughters so they can spend time fishing and relaxing together.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: A Serene Couples Retreat in Myrtle Beach, SC
programs.desc: A hardworking couple dreams of escaping Colorado's cold to find the perfect beachfront condominium; they use their real estate and remodeling skills to secure their own slice of paradise.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Busy Parents Find Their Seaside Sanctuary in Murrells Inlet, SC
programs.desc: A Pennsylvania couple pursues their dream of owning a condominium on the beach; with two young daughters growing up quickly, they hope to provide them with lasting childhood memories by renovating an older unit with potential.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programs.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Rick and Kerri sell their home and smaller lake house in order to purchase a large lake house they can live in full-time; they see a modern home situated high above the trees, a 10,000 sq ft home with soaring ceilings and a more traditional home.
